title: No support for Verilog-2001 non-ANSI port aliases

features.name: non-ANSI port alias to internal net
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI port alias in module declaration where a port is aliased to an internal net using .port(net) syntax

features.name: multiple non-ANSI port aliases to same net
features.description: Code should include multiple non-ANSI port aliases in module declaration where multiple ports are aliased to the same internal net using .port(net) syntax
